context_summary: Paused after committing 23 voter-suite e2e fixes as commit c9e9af9bc. Push rejected (branch diverged 350 ahead / 477 behind origin). Awaiting user decision on push strategy: force-with-lease vs pull-rebase vs pull-merge.

completed_this_session.fixes: ROUTE_PARAMS for Phase 62 entity-detail params, +page.ts 404 guard, voter-results.spec.ts entity-card-action testid
layout async + .first() locator + same shared chain
useSingleGroup $derived + safe find() + try/catch around getApplicableConstituency in 3 sites
beforeEach resets questionsIntro for parallel-run isolation
variant-app-settings.test.ts assertions match the questionsIntro overlay shape

commits.message: fix(voter-flow): resolve voter-suite e2e failures across multiple journeys

blockers.description: git push rejected — branch feat-gsd-roadmap is 350 ahead and 477 behind origin
blockers.workaround: user must choose between force-with-lease, pull --rebase, or pull merge

human_actions_pending.action: decide push strategy for feat-gsd-roadmap (force-with-lease / pull --rebase / pull merge)
human_actions_pending.context: branch has diverged significantly from origin; force-push would overwrite 477 remote commits

decisions.decision: Made supabaseDataProvider fan out get_nominations RPC over the (election, constituency) cartesian product instead of just [0]
decisions.rationale: single-RPC shape silently dropped all but the first electionId's nominations — broke variant-multi-election partial-coverage gate

decisions.decision: Wrapped Election.getApplicableConstituency in try/catch at three call sites instead of changing the throw semantics
decisions.rationale: the throw is correct for stand-alone use; only the hierarchical multi-cg election case needs a fallback, and changing the API contract would propagate to other consumers

decisions.decision: useSingleGroup in /constituencies must use safe .find() rather than dataRoot.getConstituencyGroup(id)
decisions.rationale: the latter throws on missing id, surfacing as a page error during the dataRoot-not-yet-populated hydration window

decisions.decision: voter-questions.spec.ts gets a beforeEach that resets questionsIntro to true
decisions.rationale: other voter specs mutate app_settings against the shared Supabase row; without a defensive reset, parallel-project runs interleave and break the journey

next_action: Confirm push strategy with user. If force-with-lease: `git push --force-with-lease origin feat-gsd-roadmap`. If rebase: `git pull --rebase` then resolve conflicts then push. If merge: `git pull` then push.
context_notes: Phase 63 itself (the parity gate at plan 3/3) is unchanged — this session's work is voter-flow E2E greening that runs adjacent to phase 63's theme. The 4 dev-seed unit failures (variant-app-settings) were pre-existing assertions that no longer matched the actual template shape; fixed in this commit. Branch diverged from origin so far that push needs an explicit strategy decision.
